name: Telegram Ingress
description: Polls Telegram Bot API updates as Metidos request ingress and supports explicit replies to the verified source chat.

env.description: Default Telegram bot token. This matches the Telegram notification provider env var so one deployment secret can be reused without sharing Plugin Settings.

settings.label: Telegram bot token
settings.description: Fallback Telegram bot token for Telegram ingress only when TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is not set. Plugin settings are scoped secrets; this value is not read from or shared with the Telegram notification provider.

ingressSources.name: Telegram
ingressSources.description: Long-polls Telegram Bot API text messages and image attachments for linked chats.
